difficulty.reason: Big seeds easy for child, fast growth, trailing, trap crop for aphids

growth_stages.name: Germination
growth_stages.look_for: Large round seed leaves on thick stems

prompt.en: Remember the big seeds you pushed in? Look -- round leaves like tiny lily pads!
prompt.da: Husker du de store froe, du trykkede ned? Se -- runde blade som smaa aaknuder!

growth_stages.name: Trailing Growth
growth_stages.look_for: Stems trailing outward from the bed, round shield-like leaves

prompt.en: The nasturtium is exploring! Point the trails where you want them to go!
prompt.da: Blomsterkarserne udforsker! Peg de ranker, hvor du vil have dem hen!

growth_stages.name: Flowering
growth_stages.look_for: Bright orange, red, and yellow trumpet flowers

prompt.en: Taste a flower -- it's peppery like a tiny pepper! Bees love them too!
prompt.da: Smag paa en blomst -- den er pebret som en lille peber! Bier elsker dem ogsaa!

prompt.en: Look under the leaves -- see tiny green bugs? Those are aphids! And the red spotted ones eat them -- ladybugs!
prompt.da: Kig under bladene -- ser du smaa groenne insekter? Det er bladlus! Og de roede med prikker spiser dem -- marihoens!

human_readable.en: Moderate water. Don't overwater -- lean soil produces more flowers.
human_readable.da: Moderat vand. Overdriv ikke -- mager jord giver flere blomster.

harvest.notes: Edible flowers: peppery taste. Seeds are 'poor man's capers'. Trap crop: draws aphids away from strawberries.

companion_plants.notes: Trap crop: draws aphids away from valuable plants. Ladybug observation point.

message.en: Frost warning! Nasturtiums will die in frost -- enjoy the last flowers!
message.da: Frostadvarsel! Blomsterkarse doer af frost -- nyd de sidste blomster!
